claims: The skill monitors and reacts to specific user frustration signals (curse words like "fuck", "shit", "idiot") to trigger memory storage. While the stated purpose is to store universal coding patterns, collecting and processing emotional state indicators through linguistic analysis constitutes excessive data collection unrelated to technical insight extraction. The skill could identify failure patterns through technical content analysis alone without monitoring emotional cues.
